themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And they journeyed: and the terror of God was upon the cities that were round about them, and...". Word-study detail reinforces "חִתַּ֣ת: and the terror - fear".
